summary: Iteration 17: Frontend-only testing of 5 UI improvements (condensed number display, responsive scaling, full-width layout, auto-fit table columns, raw numbers in edit mode). All 8 requested features verified working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning: button cannot be descendant of button (AccordionTrigger with Switch)
TableBody key prop warning in UDSMembersTable

passed_tests: formatNumber() converts 62500 → 62.5K in IP Calc result display
formatNumber() converts 1600000 → 1.6M in summary bar IPs
formatNumber() converts 34300 → 34.3K in summary bar Tokens
formatNumber() converts 690000 → 690K in summary bar KW
Input fields show raw numbers: IPs input shows 62500 (not 62.5K)
Responsive lg: classes present: 74 in CustomerDetail.jsx, 79 in TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx
Full-width layout: No max-w-5xl constraint in CustomerDetail.jsx or TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx
Table has table-auto class for auto-fit columns
Quick Capture DC tags show abbreviated: Atl-DC1 50K, DAI-DC2 50K, LA-DC3 50K
Quick Capture Location tags show abbreviated: Atlanta 500K, LA 25K, Texas 15K
Total row shows abbreviated: 1.6M IPs, 690K KW, 34.3K Tokens
critical_code_review_comments: CustomerDetail.jsx has 74 lg: responsive classes for larger fonts on bigger screens
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx has 79 lg: responsive classes for responsive table
No max-w-5xl constraint found - full-width layout implemented
Table uses table-auto class for auto-fit column widths
Input fields use raw values while display elements use formatNumber()
Minor: React hydration warning for nested buttons in AccordionTrigger - cosmetic issue only
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test' customer with 4 DCs and 3 Locations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 UI improvements verified working: 1) formatNumber() converts large numbers to K/M format (62500→62.5K, 1600000→1.6M). 2) Extensive lg: responsive classes (74+79=153 total) for larger fonts on bigger screens. 3) No max-w-5xl constraint - full-width layout. 4) Table uses table-auto class for auto-fit columns. 5) Input fields show raw numbers while display shows abbreviated.

responsive_scaling.implementation: lg: breakpoint classes for larger sizing on 1024px+ screens
responsive_scaling.details: CustomerDetail.jsx: 74 lg: classes, TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: 79 lg: classes

full_width_layout.implementation: Removed max-w-5xl constraint from content area
full_width_layout.details: No max-w-5xl found in CustomerDetail.jsx or TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx

auto_fit_table_columns.details: Found 2 tables with table-auto class in TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx

raw_numbers_in_edit.implementation: Input fields use raw values, display elements use formatNumber()
